summary: Generator-facing bindings that join command shape, operation contracts, primitive refs, schemas, projection hints, and conformance refs without owning runtime primitive behavior.

projection_requirements.core_contract_rule: Keep universal command truth in the generation contract and leave target-specific rendering, packaging, invocation, and transport details in projection metadata or generated adapters.
adapter_specific_rendering: shell function or script wrapper shape

requirements: render argv from command option semantics
dispatch to runtime binding by adapter id
preserve conformance checks as black-box process assertions
map stable command identity to package bin entrypoints
preserve option semantics without assuming Python argparse
keep runtime behavior behind package-local implementation bindings
derive wrapper invocation from universal command truth
keep quoting and environment handling target-specific
delegate runtime behavior instead of embedding primitives
derive command parameters from option semantics
keep parameter binding and error rendering target-specific
preserve read/write/effect hints for preflight decisions
map command identity to compiled entrypoint metadata
preserve schema refs and effect hints for generated docs and checks
avoid embedding source-language runtime assumptions
map operation input and output schemas to tool schemas
preserve effect hints for tool safety declarations
route implementation through runtime bindings outside the contract
derive user-facing invocation guidance from command semantics
route canonical behavior to contracts and compact command outputs
avoid duplicating doctrine in generated prose

pollution_guardrails: Do not add Python module paths to universal command truth.
Do not add host tracker, repository, or agent assumptions to generated adapter requirements.
Do not make adapter-specific rendering fields required for every target.
Do not let generated prose adapters become canonical behavior.

planning.next_step: Use the planning status adapter proof before considering summary/report/handoff read-only adapters.

memory.next_step: Use the memory status adapter proof before considering broader memory read-only adapters.

generated_adapter_owns: parser and usage wiring
